rows.label: tlk70000025_05_msg0001
rows.name:
Ever since you helped here,
everyone's been talking
about what you did.

rows.label: tlk70000025_05_msg0002
rows.name:
I used to think that the best way to
help people was to join the army.

rows.label: tlk70000025_05_msg0003
rows.name:
But now I've seen all you Drivers
and Blades in action, I'm thinking
that's totally groovy too!

rows.label: tlk70000025_05_msg0004
rows.name:
Though I don't know if I really
have Driver aptitude yet...

rows.label: tlk70000025_05_msg0005
rows.name:
But I'll do my best so someday,
when I get a Core Crystal, people
call me second only to Adel-sama!
